description_long: This is a pair of modern, two-story houses with flat roofs and a minimalist design, separated by a narrow walkway. The facades feature a combination of white and light wood paneling, with large glass windows and garage doors on the ground floor. Each house has a small balcony with a blue railing above the garage, and mature trees are planted in front of each unit, providing shade and greenery. The rear and side elevations display a mix of large, grid-style windows and smaller, rectangular windows, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The houses are set close together, typical of urban infill developments, and the overall structure emphasizes clean lines and geometric forms. The use of glass, wood, and concrete materials is prominent throughout the exterior.
description: A pair of modern, two-story houses with flat roofs, large glass windows, wood paneling, and integrated garages, separated by a narrow walkway and shaded by trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing both houses with garages, balconies, blue railings, and trees in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wood paneling, large windows, and the depth of the houses.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large grid-style windows and minimalistic, flat surfaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with wood paneling, a large window, and a tree visible in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Ground-level entry with integrated garage doors, small steps, and minimal overhang; balconies above entry with blue railings.
